title: antidesma tomentosum var. stenocarum
intro: Antidesma tomentosum var. stenocarum is a variety of the Antidesma tomentosum tree, a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia, known for its medicinal properties and uses. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Antidesma tomentosum var. stenocarum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
